text:
Once upon a time in a quaint little village nestled among rolling hills, there lived a peculiar fox named Felix. Felix wasn't just any ordinary fox. He had the ability to speak human words fluently. His favorite pastime wasn't hunting rabbits. No, dear Felix preferred to entertain the townsfolk with tales that made their toes curl.

One bright afternoon, Felix decided to tell the villagers the story of the talking frog who founded a grand kingdom from an ancient mist.

*"Listen diligently, dear people," Felix began. *"Long ago, a magnificent frog emerged from the foggy depths. He was no ordinary amphibian."

*He proclaimed.*

*"He had an enormous voice that could create songs that made the flowers dance, enchanting birds into singing night and day, and could speak fluent human. His ambition was vast. He dreamt of building a magnificent kingdom where everyone lived in harmony."

*Everyone listened eagerly.*

*"Our frog king declared he'd create delightful parks filled with mushrooms that sang oper
